name: Gedunstetes Weisskraut (Skillet Cabbage)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the vegetable oil in a large frying pan about 20 minutes before serving.
2. Add onion and cook over medium to low heat until softened.
3. Add cabbage, celery, and green pepper; stir often.
4. Cook for another 15 minutes.
5. Cover the pan during the last 5 minutes of cooking time and stir once or twice.
6. Serve immediately. (The vegetables will remain crisp.)
